title: Positive String
description:
Grammy had a unique insight about strings. She thinks that a string is positive if and only if it is lexicographically larger than its reversal.

Now you are given a string, please find out how many contiguous substrings of it are positive according to Grammy's insight.
input: The single line contains a string $S$ ($1 \leq |S| \leq 200\,000$), consisting of lowercase English letters only.
output: Output a single integer denoting the number of positive substrings of $S$.
source: Camp, Petrozavodsk Programming Camp, Summer 2022, Day 5: ZJU Contest 2
